title: windmannia lansbergiana
intro: Windmannia lansbergiana, also known as the "Mountain Mint", is a type of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to the subtropical regions of Central America and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Windmannia lansbergiana include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing digestive issues and reducing fever. Windmannia lansbergiana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health complaints.
